description: Attached-regime Cm residual. Report-only by default.
All-transition aggregate Cm diagnostic. Not applied to replay.
Transition Cm diagnostic before first post-stall exposure in each throw.
Transition Cm diagnostic after the throw has already entered post-stall.
Legacy scalar CL residual. Disabled when alpha-RBF post-stall surface fit is active.
Legacy scalar CD residual. Disabled when alpha-RBF post-stall surface fit is active.
Legacy scalar Cm residual. Disabled when alpha-RBF post-stall surface fit is active.
Positive-AoA Cmq-style residual using q_hat = q c / (2V). Opt-in because it is derivative-sensitive.
Residual activation start alpha fitted after attached and post-stall coefficients.
Residual activation full-alpha point fitted from transition behaviour while preserving post-stall full activation.
